name: Lavender
summary: Lavender is best known for calm, mild anxiety relief, and sleep support. A standardized oral lavender-oil preparation has moderate clinical evidence for mild-to-moderate anxiety, while relaxation and sleep benefits rest on smaller, lower-certainty studies, so effects are best framed as gentle rather than dramatic. It is generally well tolerated; oral use can cause mild burping or digestive upset, and pregnancy or combined use with sedatives warrants caution — discuss use with a clinician.
